note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: seeded default multi-item collateral (sovereign+corporate+FX-mismatched equity) against a cash exposure, fully collateralized, no overrides. Vector 2: one clean override (with reason_code), one unmatched asset_class falling back to a conservative 100% haircut, one override MISSING a reason_code (deficient flag fires), non-cash exposure asset_class, net exposure ends up positive. Vector 3: zero-input edge (finite gate, empty table/items, all totals zero, vacuously compliant).

vectors.name: seeded_default_compliant
vectors.description: Two-tier sovereign+corporate collateral plus an FX-mismatched equity slice against a cash exposure at the standard 10-day holding period; net exposure fully collateralized.

output_payload.note: Basel CRE22 comprehensive-approach standardized supervisory haircuts (versioned table = policy input), scaled to the supplied holding period via the square-root-of-time rule. An overridden item haircut without a reason_code is flagged and is the item-level basis for a separate signed §27 human_accountability_record (this kernel does not mint that record). An unmatched asset_class/maturity_bucket defaults to a conservative 100% haircut, flagged, never silently valued. No allocation/optimization across collateral items -- deterministic per-item haircut application and summation only. Evidence artifact only -- not a capital-return filing, never regulator-submittable.

vectors.name: override_missing_reason_and_unclassified
vectors.description: A clean haircut_override_pct (with reason_code) on the sovereign item, an unmatched exotic asset_class collateral item (falls back to 100% haircut), and a corporate item overridden WITHOUT a reason_code -- deficient flag fires. Non-cash exposure asset_class carries its own table haircut. Net exposure ends up positive (undercollateralized).

output_payload.note: Basel CRE22 comprehensive-approach standardized supervisory haircuts (versioned table = policy input), scaled to the supplied holding period via the square-root-of-time rule. An overridden item haircut without a reason_code is flagged and is the item-level basis for a separate signed §27 human_accountability_record (this kernel does not mint that record). An unmatched asset_class/maturity_bucket defaults to a conservative 100% haircut, flagged, never silently valued. No allocation/optimization across collateral items -- deterministic per-item haircut application and summation only. Evidence artifact only -- not a capital-return filing, never regulator-submittable.

vectors.name: zero_input_edge
vectors.description: No haircut table, no collateral items, zero exposure, unset holding period (defaults to 10). Finite gate: all totals resolve to zero, vacuously compliant.
